feed.title: PineconeMC
feed.subtitle: This fork of Prism Launcher adds integrated support for Ely.by accounts

entry.title: PineconeMC 11.0.0-pre2 is out
entry.summary: Now works everywhere out of the box!
entry.content:
See Prism Launcher changelogs: https://github.com/PrismLauncher/PrismLauncher/releases/tag/11.0.0-pre2 Important issues solved upstream:

  • The launcher crashes when entering the Mods, Resourcepacks or Shaderpacks pages
  • The launcher crashes when launching an instance on AppImage

PineconeMC changes:

  • The launcher will now automatically determine your connectivity to pineconemc.ru and will use the GitHub mirrors if needed. This process is transparent to the user. If connectivity restores, the launcher will switch back. This means some users will no longer have to manually switch meta servers and will now have news available
  • The launcher now automatically supplies Java arguments that improve garbage collection performance. You can look at the supplied arguments or disable this feature in Settings -> Java

This is a development build. Make sure to back up your instances.

entry.title: ElyPrismLauncher is rebranding
entry.content:
As you (hopefully) already know, ElyPrismLauncher is a fork of Prism Launcher. Not an original name for a fork, is it. It doesn't stand out and causes confusion between this fork and the original.

To stay true to the name, I've deliberately avoided introducing changes that deviate from upstream Prism that aren't directly related to Ely. As time goes on this is blocking changes that could be helpful to users.

This is why the launcher will be rebranding.

The new name is PineconeMC (the new name comes from the fact that the Ely.by project is colloquially referred as "Ёлка" in Russian, meaning "spruce tree". the spruce tree has cones - pinecones (that is not entirely accurate but close enough))

To ensure that users are affected as little as possible by this transition, it will be done gradually.

  • Only cosmetic changes will be performed at first. Old URLs will still work and file paths will remain the same
  • Then, a release of the launcher will be made with functionality to automate the migration to the new name and URLs as much as possible
  • Finally, all old URLs and remaining mentions of ElyPrismLauncher will be permanently removed
